reviews.review_description: Decent by there are similar/better  free apps.

Realistic scenarios, and a deep feelings of fall, the City level provides high emotional state due the association of the spatial soundtrack syncronized with jumps and acceleration of the boat. The Land level is quite like a real water coaster seen in several theme parks, all the sensations are there, including splashes, but also there is an extra.. the boat jumps on the edges, an effect that in reality would not be possible. Also i see that every month new racetracks are added.
Thank you to 5 star ratings

It's a Good Experience for the money. If you're looking for an intense Coaster Style experience then there's much better on the Oculus Store but it's pretty good for what it is, a little short though.

developer_response.body: We are adding new rides every month, all included with the first purchase

reviews.review_description: This isn't a game it's an experience. You ride in a boat. Pretty decent graphics and didn't give me motion sickness.
I love all of them makes you feel like you are in the boat and th Ed ester splashes on you.
Wow
I play this game more than any other App! I love it I will never stop playing this game! Can’t wait for the next version!!!

reviews.review_title: My favorite of all VR experiences!
reviews.review_description:
The flooded city is awesome! I wish the ride was longer!
UPDATE 01/24/2022 - I now have a Quest 2; PLEASE port this experience over to the Q2; I WILL purchase it again because I would not want to lose it.

I would keep it if it were the only experience available on the Q2, seriously. And, if you do port it over, keep the same song for the flooded city, but play it until the end!
Its a pretty cool experience but if possible add more rides. oh yea its a little skippy on my s6 edge plus please fix it and add the option to turn off the music and just the sounds only.

developer_response.body: Work in progress for performance improvement :)

reviews.review_description: Not bad. Great for what it is.
For the money these are great water rides....great depth to them. Real bargain
This Is A Fantastic App, It's Getting A Ride In A Boat On Ur Own, It’s Fantastic!!

This was the first game I ever purchased for the Go! 
After viewing the demo I had no hesitation in buying it. 
Play it with the sound right up for an audio as well as visual delight.
As for my favourite ride... ALL OF THEM!
I only wish it could go on 4ever
Love it
Where are the New rides that were to be added Each. month as Stated Once You Purchased it. I feel Lied to....
Müll
All 5 experiences are now updated and complete and they do not disappoint. I especially like Water City which is this fantastical experience set to an Enya-esque soundtrack.

I recently reviewed a trilogy of titles by the developer Polyraw, rides/experiences very similar to this one that I felt had real merit and value and recommended all three. In expressing their appreciation for those reviews, they suggested that I give this one a try. They act as publisher here, but the studio involved obviously carries all of the same hallmarks found in those other titles.

The graphics are really pretty good; I’ve always admired their approach to water physics. It looks so real at times. No background rendering or lag, everything just runs smooth, which is pleasantly surprising given how fast some of these tracks go. Speaking of which, there are some moments where you expect your boat to stop completely and it keeps right on going. That added the thrill element for me. The only downside, and the only thing that sort of ruined the immersion for me, is the occasionally awkward speed physics. When you should be slowing down uphill or around a heavy turn, you speed up, and when you should be speeding up downhill, you slow. It’s not too frequent, but it’s highly noticeable and distracting when it does happen.

Still, there’s a lot to like here. You have the option to play provided background music on some, and the choices are justified. For me, the nighttime ride with its steep ramp looking out over the midnight vista illuminated by the huge moon and its glow, is beautiful and worth the price of admission.

Polyraw is fully aware of what their strengths are, and they don’t deviate far from the formula. With some further imagination, I’m sure they could continue to produce truly stunning work. I look forward to what their next project will bring.
